name: Special Marinated Chicken Parts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Warm gently to dissolve the sugar, then let the mixture cool.
3. Place chicken wings in the marinade and refrigerate at 35°F for 8 hours. Reheat or re-marinade once or twice if desired.
4. Preheat smoke-oven rack to 75-85°F. Cold-smoke the wings for 1-2 hours, depending on the desired smoky flavor strength.
5. Increase oven temperature to 200-225°F and cook until done.
6. Baste the wings with some marinade during hot-smoking.
7. Serve hot or cold.
